caption: Paaduka Pattabhishekam — Bharata bears Rama's sandals to Nandigram
scene: Bharata holds Rama's paaduka (sandals) reverently upon his own head with both hands, as the assembled people gaze upon him; he departs to rule as regent from Nandigram in Rama's name. Devotional, humble posture of service and surrender.
